Tests the Math.asin function for the input +0 to ensure it returns +0.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that verifies the behavior of the `Math.asin` function in JavaScript. It checks that the arc sine of positive zero (`+0`) is correctly evaluated to positive zero (`+0`). This assertion is useful for ensuring that the `Math.asin` function conforms to expected mathematical behavior for this specific input. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this single mathematical operation.
